fixtures.name: embedded font, TrapNet, and process colour
CMYK JPEG and sampled CMYK shading

units.title: Conforming files and equipment
requirements: Header and Catalog version values do not determine PDF/X conformance.
The writer emits PDF/X-1a:2003 files and the reader processes every conforming page operator.
The reader processes the PDF/X-1a:2001 predecessor identifiers required by clause 5.

units.title: Data structure
requirements: The file has a valid header, body, classic cross-reference table, and trailer.
Pre-separated page descriptions are rejected.
All used resources and print elements are contained in one file.

units.title: Colour
requirements: Print elements use only DeviceCMYK, DeviceGray, Separation, DeviceN, Indexed, and Pattern without Default device colour spaces.
Exactly one GTS_PDFX OutputIntent is present and its identifier is a PDF text string.
Registered identifiers are verified exactly; unregistered conditions carry an ICC.1:1998 version 2 CMYK output profile.
DeviceCMYK and DeviceGray are interpreted through the output profile, including Indexed bases.
Separation and DeviceN alternates are DeviceGray or DeviceCMYK and use the same output-condition transform.
Non-print annotation appearances retain the colour spaces permitted to non-print elements.

units.title: Fonts
requirements: Every used font program, glyph, metric, and encoding is embedded and the reader uses that embedded program.
OS/2 embedding and no-subsetting permissions are enforced at the PDF output boundary.

units.title: File specifications
requirements: File specifications, external streams, OPI, and referenced Form XObjects are rejected across every active object.

units.title: Data compression
requirements: LZW and JBIG2 filters are rejected on every stream, including unreachable active objects.

units.title: Trapping
requirements: Info Trapped is exactly True or False and TrapNet requires True.
TrapNet FontFauxing is absent or empty and appearance PCM is DeviceCMYK.
TrapNet is last, has flags 68, and uses one complete PDF 1.4 invalidation mechanism.

units.title: PDF file identification
requirements: Info contains the exact PDF/X-1a:2003 identifier and non-empty Title, CreationDate, and ModDate values.
The trailer contains two file identifier strings.

units.title: Bounding boxes
requirements: Every page has exactly one TrimBox or ArtBox and all finished, bleed, crop, and media boxes have the required containment.

units.title: Extended graphics state
requirements: ExtGState TR, TR2, and HTP are rejected.
Halftones are limited to types 1 and 5, contain no HalftoneName, and validate component transfer functions.

units.title: PostScript XObject and PS operator
requirements: PS operators, PostScript XObjects, and Form Subtype2 PS are rejected recursively.

units.title: Encrypt dictionary
requirements: An Encrypt dictionary is rejected from the trailer.

units.title: Alternate images
requirements: No alternate image is DefaultForPrinting true.
Base and alternate images have the same image-area aspect and alternates are not recursively nested.

units.title: Annotations
requirements: Non-print annotations lie wholly outside BleedBox or the finished box.
PrinterMark annotations lie wholly outside the finished box and prepress appearances are print elements.

units.title: Actions and JavaScripts
requirements: Actions and JavaScript are rejected in the Catalog, pages, annotations, name trees, and every active object.

units.title: BX and EX operators
requirements: Undefined operators are rejected even inside BX and EX.
Defined operators inside BX and EX are parsed and processed normally.

units.title: Transparency
requirements: SMask is absent or None, image embedded alpha is absent, and transparency groups are rejected.
ExtGState BM is Normal or Compatible and CA and ca are exactly 1.0.

units.title: Viewer preferences
requirements: When BleedBox is present, ViewArea, ViewClip, PrintArea, and PrintClip are MediaBox or BleedBox.
